name: Alexander Wang

acts.description: Multiple men accused him of drugging and sexually assaulting them at parties and events

behavior_summary: At least seven men publicly accused him of drugging and sexual assault at industry events. He denied all claims. No criminal charges were filed.

art.summary: Influential fashion designer who defined downtown cool and sportswear-luxury crossover for a generation.

verdict.blurb: Built a brand on cool effortlessness while, according to multiple accusers, drugging men and assaulting them. The clothes remain. So does he.
